mapper.select: SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID AS EMP_ID, e.FIRST_NAME || ' ' || e.LAST_NAME AS NAME, e.EMAIL, e.HIRE_DATE, e.JOB_ID, e.SALARY FROM HR.EMPLOYEES e WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID BETWEEN #{p_emp_id_min} AND #{p_emp_id_max} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary}

SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID AS EMP_ID, e.FIRST_NAME || ' ' || e.LAST_NAME AS EMP_NAME, j.JOB_TITLE, e.SALARY FROM HR.EMPLOYEES e JOIN HR.JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID = e.JOB_ID WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} AND e.SALARY BETWEEN #{p_min_salary} AND #{p_max_salary}

SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.FIRST_NAME, e.LAST_NAME, d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, j.JOB_ID, j.JOB_TITLE, e.SALARY, CASE WHEN e.SALARY >= 20000 THEN 'EXEC' WHEN e.SALARY >= 12000 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN e.SALARY >= 7000 THEN 'MID' ELSE 'LOW' END AS SALARY_BAND FROM HR.EMPLOYEES e LEFT JOIN HR.DEPARTMENTS d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID = e.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN HR.JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID = e.JOB_ID WHERE e.DEPARTMENT_ID = #{p_dept_id} AND e.SALARY BETWEEN #{p_salary_low} AND #{p_salary_high}

SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, COUNT(e.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS EMP_COUNT, SUM(NVL(e.SALARY, 0)) AS TOTAL_SALARY, AVG(NVL(e.SALARY, 0)) AS AVG_SALARY FROM HR.DEPARTMENTS d LEFT JOIN HR.EMPLOYEES e ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID WHERE d.DEPARTMENT_ID BETWEEN #{p_dept_from} AND #{p_dept_to} AND NVL(e.SALARY, 0) >= #{p_min_salary} GROUP BY d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME

SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.DEPARTMENT_ID, e.JOB_ID, e.SALARY, e.HIRE_DATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID ORDER BY e.SALARY DESC, e.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS DEPT_SALARY_RN, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID ORDER BY e.SALARY DESC) AS JOB_SALARY_DR FROM HR.EMPLOYEES e WHERE e.DEPARTMENT_ID = #{p_dept_id} AND e.SALARY BETWEEN #{p_min_salary} AND #{p_max_salary}

SELECT b.EMPLOYEE_ID, b.DEPARTMENT_ID, b.JOB_ID, b.SALARY, b.HIRE_DATE, b.DEPT_JOB_SALARY_RN FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.DEPARTMENT_ID, e.JOB_ID, e.SALARY, e.HIRE_DATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID, e.JOB_ID ORDER BY e.SALARY DESC, e.EMPLOYEE_ID ) AS DEPT_JOB_SALARY_RN FROM HR.EMPLOYEES e WHERE e.DEPARTMENT_ID = #{p_dept_id} AND e.JOB_ID = #{p_job_id} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} ) b WHERE b.DEPT_JOB_SALARY_RN >= 1

SELECT p.DEPARTMENT_ID, p.DEPARTMENT_NAME, p.JOB_ID, p.JOB_TITLE, COUNT(p.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS EMP_COUNT, SUM(p.SALARY) AS TOTAL_SALARY FROM ( SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, j.JOB_ID, j.JOB_TITLE, e.EMPLOYEE_ID, NVL(e.SALARY, 0) AS SALARY FROM HR.DEPARTMENTS d LEFT JOIN HR.EMPLOYEES e ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN HR.JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID = e.JOB_ID ) p WHERE p.DEPARTMENT_ID BETWEEN #{p_dept_from} AND #{p_dept_to} AND p.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} GROUP BY p.DEPARTMENT_ID, p.DEPARTMENT_NAME, p.JOB_ID, p.JOB_TITLE

SELECT c.EMPLOYEE_ID, c.JOB_ID, c.SALARY, c.HIRE_DATE FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.JOB_ID, e.SALARY, e.HIRE_DATE FROM HR.EMPLOYEES e WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} ) c WHERE c.JOB_ID = #{p_job_id}

SELECT b.DEPARTMENT_ID, b.DEPARTMENT_NAME, b.EMP_COUNT, b.TOTAL_SALARY, b.AVG_SALARY, b.MIN_SALARY, b.MAX_SALARY, b.DISTINCT_JOB_COUNT FROM ( SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, COUNT(e.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS EMP_COUNT, SUM(NVL(e.SALARY, 0)) AS TOTAL_SALARY, AVG(NVL(e.SALARY, 0)) AS AVG_SALARY, MIN(NVL(e.SALARY, 0)) AS MIN_SALARY, MAX(NVL(e.SALARY, 0)) AS MAX_SALARY, COUNT(DISTINCT e.JOB_ID) AS DISTINCT_JOB_COUNT FROM HR.DEPARTMENTS d LEFT JOIN HR.EMPLOYEES e ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID WHERE d.DEPARTMENT_ID BETWEEN #{p_dept_from} AND #{p_dept_to} GROUP BY d.DEPARTMENT_ID, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME ) b WHERE b.MIN_SALARY >= #{p_min_salary}

SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.FIRST_NAME, e.LAST_NAME, e.EMAIL, e.HIRE_DATE, e.JOB_ID, e.SALARY, e.TENURE_MONTHS, e.JOB_EMP_COUNT, e.JOB_TOTAL_SALARY, e.JOB_AVG_SALARY, e.JOB_MIN_SALARY, e.JOB_MAX_SALARY, e.JOB_P50_SALARY, e.SALARY_SHARE_IN_JOB, e.JOB_SALARY_RN, e.JOB_SALARY_DR, e.JOB_SALARY_QUARTILE, NVL(e.PREV_SALARY_IN_JOB, e.SALARY) AS PREV_SALARY_IN_JOB, CASE WHEN e.SALARY >= e.JOB_P50_SALARY THEN 'ABOVE_JOB_MEDIAN' ELSE 'BELOW_JOB_MEDIAN' END AS JOB_POSITION, CASE WHEN e.JOB_SALARY_RN = 1 THEN 'TOP_IN_JOB' WHEN e.JOB_SALARY_RN <= 3 THEN 'TOP3_IN_JOB' ELSE 'GENERAL_IN_JOB' END AS JOB_RANK_BAND FROM ( SELECT b.EMPLOYEE_ID, b.FIRST_NAME, b.LAST_NAME, b.EMAIL, b.HIRE_DATE, b.JOB_ID, b.SALARY, b.TENURE_MONTHS, s.JOB_EMP_COUNT, s.JOB_TOTAL_SALARY, s.JOB_AVG_SALARY, s.JOB_MIN_SALARY, s.JOB_MAX_SALARY, s.JOB_P50_SALARY, ROUND(b.SALARY_SHARE_IN_JOB, 6) AS SALARY_SHARE_IN_JOB, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY b.JOB_ID ORDER BY b.SALARY DESC, b.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS JOB_SALARY_RN, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY b.JOB_ID ORDER BY b.SALARY DESC) AS JOB_SALARY_DR, NTILE(4) OVER (PARTITION BY b.JOB_ID ORDER BY b.SALARY DESC, b.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS JOB_SALARY_QUARTILE, LAG(b.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY b.JOB_ID ORDER BY b.SALARY DESC, b.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS PREV_SALARY_IN_JOB FROM ( SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.FIRST_NAME, e.LAST_NAME, e.EMAIL, e.HIRE_DATE, e.JOB_ID, e.SALARY, TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE), TRUNC(e.HIRE_DATE))) AS TENURE_MONTHS, RATIO_TO_REPORT(e.SALARY) OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID) AS SALARY_SHARE_IN_JOB FROM HR.EMPLOYEES e WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} AND e.JOB_ID = #{p_job_id} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} ) b JOIN ( SELECT x.JOB_ID, COUNT(*) AS JOB_EMP_COUNT, SUM(x.SALARY) AS JOB_TOTAL_SALARY, AVG(x.SALARY) AS JOB_AVG_SALARY, MIN(x.SALARY) AS JOB_MIN_SALARY, MAX(x.SALARY) AS JOB_MAX_SALARY, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY x.SALARY) AS JOB_P50_SALARY FROM ( SELECT e.JOB_ID, e.SALARY FROM HR.EMPLOYEES e WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID >= #{p_emp_id_min} AND e.JOB_ID = #{p_job_id} AND e.SALARY >= #{p_min_salary} ) x GROUP BY x.JOB_ID ) s ON s.JOB_ID = b.JOB_ID ) e WHERE e.TENURE_MONTHS >= 0
